1.0.1.en: Reliability and security improvements: TLS validation re-enabled on the operational MQTT connection, reconnection backoff math fixed, idempotent client creation eliminates the multi-device boot race, zone sensors recover when alarm-panel hasn't initialised yet, alarm trigger debounced (no more spam during a sustained alarm), 3-second grace period before flapping the device offline, schema-versioned capability migration.

1.0.2.en: Adds an Export/Restore feature to app settings: back up your pairing data so you can recover from a Homey wipe or app reinstall without consuming another IQ Remote slot. Pairing flow is also more reliable — fixed an issue where the UI would falsely report a 30-second timeout, and the on-screen instructions are now visible during the pairing window. The panel IP is detected automatically; you no longer have to type it.
